choices.text: TurtleBot 4 (~$2k, ROS 2 native) for mobile robotics or Crazyflie 2.1 (~$200) for drones. Designed for education + research; full ROS 2 ecosystem. Industrial systems (UR/Franka) cost $30k+ and overkill for learning.

Booming: Tesla Optimus, Figure 01 (BMW warehouse), Boston Dynamics Atlas, Unitree H1 ($90k affordable), Agility Digit (logistics). Major investment + early commercial deployments 2024-2026. Driven by foundation models + RL advances.

questions.explanation: Optimus, Figure, Atlas, Unitree H1, Digit.
